solution: 
```java
class Solution {
    public boolean divisorGame(int n) {
        return n % 2 == 0;
    }
}
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution leverages the observation that Alice wins if and only if n is even. This is because she can always choose x=1, forcing Bob into a losing position with an odd number. The approach is optimal with constant time and space complexity.
